name: Nic Roberts-Huntley
description: Oxford-trained surgeon turned DeFi builder. Nic leads the overall vision and strategy of Concrete, bringing institutional-grade discipline to on-chain finance.
whyFollow: Nic shares raw founder insights, protocol updates and big-picture DeFi thinking. If you want to understand where Concrete is headed, follow the CEO.
whatTheyDo: Nic sets the overall direction for Blueprint Finance and Concrete. He manages investor relations, leads fundraising, and represents the protocol publicly. As a former Oxford surgeon and Point72 VP, he brings a unique cross-disciplinary lens to DeFi infrastructure.

name: Dillon Liang
description: Co-builder of the Concrete ecosystem working across product, strategy, and ecosystem growth — helping shape how Concrete expands across chains and partners.
whyFollow: Dillon posts detailed threads on product milestones and DeFi strategy. One of the most active builders on CT.
whatTheyDo: Dillon co-leads Blueprint Finance alongside Nic, owning product direction and go-to-market strategy. He's been instrumental in growing Concrete from zero to $650M+ in deposits and coordinating the multi-chain expansion with Glow on Solana.

name: Toji
description: Drives Concrete's brand presence, community growth, and marketing strategy across social, events, and ecosystem partnerships.
whyFollow: Toji is behind Concrete's voice on social — follow them to catch every major announcement, campaign, and community initiative first.
whatTheyDo: Toji leads all marketing and communications for Concrete. From Twitter/X strategy to IRL event presence, they shape how the protocol is perceived externally.

name: Gustavo Silva
description: Leads engineering operations at Blueprint Finance. Oversees smart contract delivery, engineering velocity, and technical hiring.
whyFollow: Follow Gustavo for technical insights on how institutional DeFi infrastructure gets built and shipped.
whatTheyDo: Gustavo manages Blueprint Finance's engineering team, owning release management, smart contract delivery, and cross-team technical coordination. He joined from ConsenSys bringing deep Web3 engineering experience.

name: Luke H
description: Former EigenLayer. Luke leads all growth strategy at Blueprint Finance — from user acquisition to institutional partnerships and protocol adoption.
whyFollow: Luke is the person shaping Concrete's growth story — from integrations to campaigns to institutional BD.
whatTheyDo: Luke owns the full growth function at Blueprint Finance. He came from EigenLayer and is behind major milestones including the Binance Wallet integration and the protocol's growth to $650M+ in TVL.

name: Depoche
description: Leads quality assurance at Concrete, ensuring the protocol ships reliably and securely across every release.
whyFollow: If you care about how a DeFi protocol ships safely, Depoche is worth following for the QA and testing perspective.
whatTheyDo: Depoche runs the QA function at Concrete, managing test coverage, testnet cycles, and pre-mainnet checklists. They work closely with engineering to ensure every release meets the protocol's high security standards.
